kicadstudio.description: The complete KiCad development environment for VS Code — view schematics & PCBs, run DRC/ERC, export production files, search components, and get AI-powered design assistance.
kicadstudio.capabilities.untrustedWorksp: KiCad Studio provides read-only language and viewer features in Restricted Mode. Commands that launch kicad-cli, KiCad, or external export/import tooling require workspace trust.
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.0.c:
Open a folder containing a `.kicad_pro`, `.kicad_sch`, or `.kicad_pcb` file to start using KiCad Studio.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
[Open Settings Panel](command:kicadstudio.openSettings)
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.1.c:
Catch layout and electrical violations before manufacturing.

[Run DRC](command:kicadstudio.runDRC)
[Run ERC](command:kicadstudio.runERC)

Results appear in the **Problems** panel below.
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.2.c:
Workspace is in Restricted Mode — DRC/ERC are disabled.

[Manage Workspace Trust](command:workbench.action.manageTrust)
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.3.c:
Open a KiCad project to run design rule checks.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.4.c:
Open a KiCad project to view the Bill of Materials.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.5.c:
Open a KiCad project to inspect the netlist.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
kicadstudio.contributes.viewsWelcome.6.c: Open a KiCad 10 project to browse and switch design variants.
Connected via VS Code stdio.
[Open Log](command:kicadstudio.mcp.openLog)
[Switch to HTTP Mode](command:kicadstudio.mcp.launchHttp)
Connect `kicad-mcp-pro` to see actionable AI fixes here.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)
No pending AI fixes.

[Run Quality Gates](command:kicadstudio.qualityGate.runAll)
[Open AI Chat](command:kicadstudio.openAiChat)
[Refresh Fix Queue](command:kicadstudio.refreshFixQueue)
kicad-mcp-pro is connected via VS Code stdio.

AI fixes require the HTTP transport.
[Switch to HTTP Mode](command:kicadstudio.mcp.launchHttp)

Or open the **AI Chat** panel and use MCP tools there instead.
Connect `kicad-mcp-pro` over HTTP to run schematic, placement, PCB transfer, and manufacturing gates.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)
[Install kicad-mcp-pro](command:kicadstudio.mcp.install)
kicad-mcp-pro is connected via VS Code stdio.

Quality Gates require the HTTP transport (port 27185).
[Switch to HTTP Mode](command:kicadstudio.mcp.launchHttp)
No `.kicad_dru` rule file found in the active project.

[Create .kicad_dru](command:kicadstudio.drcRule.createDefault)
[Import starter template](command:kicadstudio.drcRule.importTemplate)
[Add DRC Rule with AI](command:kicadstudio.drcRule.addWithMcp)
[Open KiCad design rules docs](command:kicadstudio.qualityGate.openDocs)
Open a KiCad project to manage custom DRC rules.
[Open Folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
Search for components by part number, keyword, or footprint across local KiCad libraries, LCSC, and Octopart/Nexar.
[Search Component](command:kicadstudio.searchComponent)

Store your Octopart/Nexar API key to enable cloud search:
[Set Octopart/Nexar API Key](command:kicadstudio.setOctopartApiKey)

Configure AI provider keys for AI-assisted matching:
[Set AI API Key](command:kicadstudio.setAiApiKey)

kicadstudio.contributes.configuration.pr: Path to kicad-cli executable or a Flatpak command (e.g. 'flatpak run --command=kicad-cli org.kicad.KiCad'). Leave empty for auto-detection.
Path to KiCad installation directory (used to open files in KiCad).
Default output directory for exports (relative to project root).
Gerber file precision (number of digits).
Use Protel file extensions for Gerber files.
IPC-2581 standard version.
Units for IPC-2581 export.
Group identical components in BOM.
BOM fields to include and their order.
Optional KiCad CLI --define-var values that are passed to compatible kicad-cli commands.
Color theme for schematic and PCB viewers.
Automatically refresh viewer when file is saved.
Maximum file size for fully interactive embedded viewing before KiCad Studio falls back to metadata-only mode.
Automatically sync viewer colors with the active VS Code theme.
Show layer visibility controls when PCB metadata is available.
Enable PNG and SVG export actions inside the embedded viewer.
Enable LCSC component search.
AI provider for circuit analysis and error explanation.
Optional AI model override. Leave empty to use the provider default when the provider has one.
OpenAI-compatible local chat endpoint base URL. KiCad Studio enables the local provider only after this endpoint is configured.
OpenAI API mode. Responses is the default for new work; Chat Completions is retained for compatibility.
Gemini API mode (REST only; Vertex AI not yet supported).
Maximum tokens for AI responses. Higher values allow more detailed analysis.
Stream AI responses in the chat panel as they arrive.
AI request timeout in seconds.
Language for AI-generated answers. Extension UI language follows VS Code locale packs.
Allow KiCad Studio to register language-model tools when the host VS Code build supports them.
KiCad Studio log verbosity
Automatically run DRC when PCB file is saved.
Automatically run ERC when schematic file is saved.
Automatically detect kicad-mcp-pro and offer to create .vscode/mcp.json.
Loopback kicad-mcp-pro HTTP endpoint when the server is running in HTTP mode.
Allow KiCad Studio to connect to a non-loopback MCP HTTP endpoint. Keep disabled unless you intentionally trust that remote server.
Allow a best-effort fallback to the legacy /sse MCP transport when Streamable HTTP is unavailable.
MCP HTTP request timeout in seconds.
Push active file, DRC summary, and lasso selection context to kicad-mcp-pro.
Preferred kicad-mcp-pro profile when no workspace .vscode/mcp.json overrides it.
Number of recent MCP request/response log entries retained in memory.
Saved export presets managed by the extension.
Enable local KiCad Studio telemetry hooks. This build does not send telemetry to a network backend.
kicadstudio.contributes.walkthroughs.0.d: Set up KiCad Studio for your first project.
kicadstudio.contributes.walkthroughs.0.s: KiCad Studio uses kicad-cli for exports and checks. [Detect automatically](command:kicadstudio.detectCli)
Open a folder containing a .kicad_pro file. [Open folder](command:workbench.action.files.openFolder)
Click any .kicad_sch file to open the interactive viewer.
Use the Variants sidebar to create, activate, and compare design variants in KiCad 10 projects.
Bootstrap optional MCP integration to unlock fix queues, design intent forms, and tool-backed AI workflows. [Setup MCP](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)
Open the Settings Panel to choose Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or GitHub Copilot and store provider keys securely. [Open Settings Panel](command:kicadstudio.openSettings)
Run DRC, then ask the AI chat to summarize and prioritize the findings.
Export fabrication packages, 3D assets, or KiCad 10 3D PDF files from the Command Palette.
kicadstudio.contributes.walkthroughs.1.d: Install kicad-mcp-pro, choose a focused profile, run quality gates, and prepare a gated release.
kicadstudio.contributes.walkthroughs.1.s:
Install the optional MCP server for AI-assisted KiCad review and release workflows.
[Install kicad-mcp-pro](command:kicadstudio.mcp.install)

Create a workspace MCP configuration once kicad-mcp-pro is available.
[Setup MCP Integration](command:kicadstudio.setupMcpIntegration)

Select the smallest MCP profile that fits this project.
[Pick MCP Profile](command:kicadstudio.mcp.pickProfile)

Open the Quality Gates view and run the current project checks.
[Run All Quality Gates](command:kicadstudio.qualityGate.runAll)

Use the manufacturing release wizard after the quality gates are clean.
[Open Release Wizard](command:kicadstudio.manufacturing.release)
kicadstudio.contributes.languageModelToo: Run KiCad DRC
Run KiCad DRC for the current or specified board.
Runs KiCad DRC on a .kicad_pcb file and returns a diagnostic summary plus machine-readable diagnostics. Use this when the user asks to check PCB design-rule violations.
Optional absolute path to the .kicad_pcb file. When omitted, KiCad Studio uses the active board or the first board in the workspace.
Run KiCad ERC
Run KiCad ERC for the current or specified schematic.
Runs KiCad ERC on a .kicad_sch file and returns a diagnostic summary plus machine-readable diagnostics. Use this when the user asks to check schematic electrical-rule violations.
Optional absolute path to the .kicad_sch file. When omitted, KiCad Studio uses the active schematic or the first schematic in the workspace.
Export KiCad Gerbers
Export Gerber fabrication files for the current or specified PCB.
Exports Gerber fabrication files for a KiCad board into the configured KiCad Studio output directory. Use this only when the user explicitly wants manufacturing files created.
Optional absolute path to the .kicad_pcb file to export.
Optional KiCad 10 variant name to pass to supported kicad-cli exports.
Open File
Open a local file or URI in the editor.
Opens a file or URI in VS Code so the user and subsequent tools can inspect it. Use when a chat request needs a specific document opened.
Absolute file path or URI to open.
Search Components
Search online component sources configured in KiCad Studio.
Searches Octopart/Nexar and LCSC through KiCad Studio and returns matching parts. Use when the user asks for component sourcing or part suggestions.
Part number, manufacturer part number, value, or descriptive query to search.
Search Symbols
Search indexed KiCad symbol libraries.
Searches the local KiCad symbol index and returns matching symbols by name, description, or keyword.
Symbol name, keyword, or description fragment to search.
Search Footprints
Search indexed KiCad footprint libraries.
Searches the local KiCad footprint index and returns matching footprints by name, description, or tags.
Footprint name, tag, or description fragment to search.
Get Active KiCad Context
Return the current KiCad Studio editor and diagnostics context.

Returns the active file, file type, active variant, DRC summary inputs, cursor position, and other live KiCad Studio context. Use when the model needs up-to-date project state before deciding on another tool call.
List KiCad Variants
List the KiCad 10 design variants known to the workspace.
Returns the available KiCad design variants and override counts. Use when the user asks which variants exist or before switching variants.
Switch KiCad Variant
Change the active KiCad design variant.
Sets the active KiCad 10 variant in the project file. Use only when the user explicitly wants to switch variants.
Exact KiCad variant name to activate.
